hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd webapp && npx eslint --no-warn-ignored --max-warnings 0 "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20; fi

jq -r 'select((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("/Cases/[^/]+/deliverables/")) | .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && bash scripts/voice_check.sh "$f"; }
